message:
fix(fsqlite-vdbe): remove write set check from PageReader for savepoint compatibility (bd-kivg)

The PageReader::read_page implementation was checking the concurrent
write set before delegating to the pager transaction. This caused
savepoint rollbacks to return stale data because the write set was
not synchronized with savepoint restore operations.

The pager's transaction already provides correct read-your-own-writes
semantics through its page cache, which also properly handles savepoint
rollbacks. The write set is primarily for:
1. Recording which pages have been modified (for FCW validation at commit)
2. Holding page locks during the transaction

Checking the write set for reads is unnecessary and incorrect when
savepoints are in use.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
